textByHash.1626a0100eb2efc1df42fa377a7c2a5464bec39e: Wait, seriously? I could have sworn someone did. Oh no, Gem won't take this well.
textByHash.1e9b09a0dddfff009b2e0ecc450000c987814269: Look, I don't choose the prices here. I'm just trying to make a living selling beer.
textByHash.23737533f8ce5c9b45d6648056a4166d85772168: That's alright. Just make sure your friends buy plenty of beer. If you're not paying my wages, we'll have to rely on commission!
textByHash.24f8ecd66cca20834618ecccc9992133c6e48858: Sometimes, when the hall is empty, I like to stand up on the railing and pretend I'm singing at a stage in front of many people.
textByHash.2c9fbfcc95bfeaa4619a6746ea3e5bc48021b62d: Oh hii! I just thinking how I wish I had a pork and blue cheese pie right now. Mm-mmm. Anyway, how can I help?
textByHash.32341103b78eb4369c825f62f2b2c284c6cc0b82: That's alright. Come back when you do.
textByHash.4825874c57bc768c486189570584142bd6e4ca6a: Yay! That will be 5 coins, please.
textByHash.58921dd0f88637b1564676aee5d15f53b3c80921: OH GEEEEM! You missed a spot!
textByHash.5dd6d086945f16465892f7285c617516822a6482: Gem, my friend over there, isn't actually called Gem. I came up with that name for her. It suits her, don't you think?
textByHash.73e5ea40fcd0c3ad0a8d34afeb27ee37b9f6ae90: Either way, I have beer! Would you like to buy some?
textByHash.96b8f77cfe9f16336949dc2bd5b85617d305489d: Oh hii! I just finished telling Gem about this time I was working with some geese. Ah, how time has flown since then. Anyway, what can I help you with?
textByHash.df463534b83b14c6aaec11f5d749410247a1efec: You want to know about me? Oh where do I begin. Let's see...
textByHash.e108b5899f7ae8f4a5f34995f28d94fec7085053: Oh hii! I was in the middle of singing this new song to Gem. She doesn't seem to like it much. Anyway, what can I do for you?
textByHash.f4586242d67cca7c9a2564428f02ddb0bd360685: I used to work with geese. One day they attacked me and since then I have had serious trust issues with them.
textByHash.fa789d4517ed6ff9248f6a99fa83489dd5cc0ed5: Hi! My name is Raqueel. I work as a barmaid here in the clan hall. My friend, Gem, over there works here too.
